steps.speech: On the far left, we have Gamma and X-rays. These have the shortest wavelengths and pack the most intense energy, which is why X-rays can pass through your skin!
In the middle is a tiny sliver known as Visible Light. This contains all the colors of the rainbow and is the only part of the spectrum our eyes can actually see.
On the far right are Microwaves and Radio waves. They have very long wavelengths and low energy, perfect for carrying music to your car radio or heating up your food.
